title: Remembering Professor MP Singh’s contributions
description: As a student at the Delhi University’s (DU) Law Faculty in the early 2000s, a distinct memory I have is that of a classroom overflowing with students, waiting for a smartly dressed man who would walk into a class with books in one hand and an attendance register in the other. This man was Professor MP Singh, who taught Constitutional Law.Singh spoke softly but firmly and though he lacked the flamboyance of other teachers like Professor Moolchand Sharma, the depth of his scholarship and his
